name: AI Compliance Engine
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for policy interpretation, compliance gap analysis, remediation recommendation, and audit report generation

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for real-time compliance across subscriptions

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Compliance findings, audit trails, policy rule definitions, remediation history, evidence repository

prod.note: Multi-partition, 100GB, strong consistency for audit integrity

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Compliance scan orchestration — scheduled policy checks, event-driven rule evaluation, remediation triggers

enterprise.note: Always-warm, VNET integration, no cold start

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.purpose: Resource change notifications, policy violation alerts, remediation workflow triggers

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: OpenAI API keys, signing certificates for audit reports, encryption keys for compliance evidence

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Compliance evidence artifacts — scan reports, policy documents, remediation screenshots, audit exports

prod.note: ~300GB, immutable blob policies for audit retention

services.name: Log Analytics
services.purpose: Centralized compliance audit log — scan results, policy changes, remediation actions, access events

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Compliance engine performance — scan duration, rule evaluation latency, API response times

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine policy checks (tag validation, naming compliance) — reserve GPT-4o for complex regulatory gap analysis
Cache compliance rule evaluations per resource type — re-evaluate only when the resource configuration or policy version changes
Use Cosmos DB serverless for dev — saves $75/month vs provisioned when compliance scans run only a few times daily
Implement incremental scanning — only evaluate resources changed since last scan via Event Grid notifications instead of full sweeps
Use Blob Storage immutable policies only for production/enterprise — dev environments don't need WORM compliance
Schedule full compliance sweeps during off-peak hours to take advantage of lower consumption-tier pricing on Functions
